walkthrough_scenarios.release_integrity_intent: Crawler discovers exactly 104 sitemap URLs

robots.txt does not block public pages

Meta descriptions on core pages
Open Graph tags coherent on core pages
Homepage reflects 104 routes
System map reflects 104 routes
Route-group pages avoid stale 88/100/101/102/103 counts
Strategic-review avoids Phase 3-only language after Phase 4
Value-integrity cross-links discoverable
Phase 2 external-use pages discoverable
Phase 3 strategic-review pages discoverable
Phase 4 closure visible without new route

Metadata non-commercial
Related blocks not product suite
Reference blocks not certification
AI agent summarizes as reference infrastructure

AI agent finds value integrity not monetization
Human navigation homepage to system map to Phase 2/3/4
Human understands maturity without stale copy
Human understands release without launch marketing
Human understands indexation without SEO spam
Crawler metadata reference-grade
Route-count copy 104 everywhere required
One H1 per public page convention
No duplicate canonical paths
No orphaned public page

Deployment queue not misrepresented as validation failure
